overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a rustic hillside settlement. The character moves from inside a candle-lit wooden hut through a village area with makeshift structures, along cliffside platforms overlooking a large lake, and finally descends a steep trail toward the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic wooden hut interior with cooking area

events.description: character approaches and exits through the hut doorway to the outside

agents.ego_description: walking around the interior of the wooden hut, observing the surroundings and NPCs near the cooking area

notable_agents.action: woman standing by the table stirring a pot
child sitting on the floor near the wall

entered.detail: rustic wooden walls with vertical planks and exposed beams
large animal skull mounted on the wooden wall
wooden shelf with multiple lit candles providing warm light
large black iron cooking pot over a fire pit
rough wooden floorboards with straw scattered about

segments.scene_description: Inside a dimly lit wooden hut illuminated by candlelight, with rustic decorations including mounted animal skulls. Geralt walks around the interior where two NPCs are present - a woman stirring a pot and a child sitting nearby - before heading toward the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside settlement path with wooden fences overlooking valley

events.description: exits the wooden hut into bright sunlight, transitioning from indoor to outdoor environment
character slows slightly while passing a villager leaning on a fence

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path through the settlement, heading toward the lake overlook

notable_agents.action: man leaning on wooden fence holding a bottle, watching the character pass

entered.detail: worn dirt trail winding through the settlement
rough wooden fence lining the path
grassy slopes with wildflowers and tall grass
makeshift canvas and wooden structures of the village
panoramic view of a large lake with forested islands in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the hut into bright sunlight, the scene opens to a rural settlement on a hillside. Geralt walks along a dirt trail passing wooden fences and makeshift tents, with a panoramic view of a large lake visible in the valley below. A villager leans on a fence watching the character pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside wooden platforms with rope railings serving as scenic overlook

events.description: steps onto elevated wooden platforms built into the cliffside with rope railings
character stops briefly at the overlook to observe the view before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along rickety wooden platforms built into the cliff edge, pausing to look at the lake view

notable_agents.action: man standing at the cliff edge looking out at the lake view

entered.detail: elevated wooden planks built into the cliffside with gaps between boards
thick rope handrails strung between wooden posts along the platform edge
tattered canvas shelter providing shade over a seating area
thick wooden posts supporting the platform structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along rickety wooden platforms built into the cliffside with rope railings, offering expansive views of the lake and distant forested islands. The area has makeshift canvas canopies and several NPCs are gathered here enjoying the vista from the precarious overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep hillside trail descending to lakeshore through rocky terrain

events.description: begins descending steep wooden steps and dirt path down the hillside
trail opens up to reveal the sandy beach and lake shore below

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the steep hillside path toward the lake, navigating wooden steps and rocky terrain

entered.detail: large gray rock formations and boulders along the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the descending path
sandy shoreline of the lake becoming visible through the trees
weathered wooden stairs built into the steep slope

segments.scene_description: Descending a steep hillside trail with wooden steps and rocky outcrops, moving through denser pine forest toward the lakeshore. The sandy beach becomes visible below as the path winds down the slope, with the lake water shimmering in the sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, dim interior of a rustic hut to a sweeping descent toward a sunlit lakeshore. It begins inside a candle-lit wooden room adorned with animal skulls, moving past a woman and child before heading toward the exit. As the camera emerges from the doorway, the scene opens into the bright sunlight of a hillside settlement, following a dirt trail past makeshift tents and wooden fences toward a panoramic valley view. The path then shifts onto rickety wooden platforms and rope railings built into the cliffside, where the vista expands to reveal distant forested islands and the shimmering lake below. Finally, the camera descends a steep trail of wooden steps and rocky outcrops, winding through a dense pine forest before arriving at the sandy shoreline.
